description: The quick action detection in handleSend uses simple string matching (includes('briefing'), includes('commute')) which could trigger false positives. A user typing 'tell me about the briefing process' would switch to briefing view instead of chatting. Implement more robust intent detection or move this logic to backend.
successCriteria: Quick action detection only triggers on exact matches or obvious intents
False positives are eliminated (e.g., 'tell me about briefings' doesn't auto-switch views)
Intent detection logic is more robust or moved to Claude API backend
